title: NA Beer Taste Test: Top 5 Picks
description: Side-by-side blind taste test of the five best non-alcoholic beers on the U.S. market right now, ranked by host + two guest tasters. Quick cuts, big on-screen ranking, no sponsor reads.
hook: We tried 20 NA beers so you don't have to.
keyMessage: The NA beer category is finally good enough to recommend without caveats.

cta.text: Follow for the full mocktail + NA series

strategy.keyMessage: The NA beer category is finally good enough to recommend without caveats.

creativePlan.hook: We tried 20 NA beers so you don't have to.
creativePlan.musicNotes: Up-tempo synth-pop, hard cuts on each taste

outputs.ctaLine: Follow for the full mocktail + NA series.

video.hook: We tried 20 NA beers so you don't have to.
video.body:
Three of us. Blind taste test. Real beer drinkers, not influencers. Here are the only five we'd actually buy a six-pack of.

Number 5: Athletic Brewing 'Run Wild' IPA. Hops without the headache.
Number 4: Heineken 0.0. Boring, dependable, never offends.
Number 3: Best Day 'Kölsch.' Smooth enough that two of us thought it had alcohol.
Number 2: Untitled Art 'Italian Pilsner.' The dark horse — get it if you can find it.
Number 1: Lagunitas 'Hoppy Refresher.' Not even labeled as beer. Drinks like one. Wins.
video.cta: Follow for the mocktail half of this series next Thursday.
hookBank: We tried 20 NA beers so you don't have to.
These five NA beers don't taste like punishment.
Blind taste test of NA beers. The result surprised us.
If you've given up on NA beer, watch this first.
video.bRollNotes: Quick cuts on each pour. Tight on faces during first sip. On-screen ranking jumps on every cut. End on a tight close-up of the #1 can.
video.voiceoverNotes: Playful, fast-paced. Mara hosts. Jordan reacts off-camera. No script reads — let the reactions carry it.
